test.create_query: CREATE TABLE projection_index_narrow_marks ( id UInt64, trace_id FixedString(16), payload String, PROJECTION by_trace_id (SELECT _part_offset ORDER BY trace_id) ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY id SETTINGS index_granularity = 8, max_bytes_to_merge_at_max_space_in_pool = 1
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO projection_index_narrow_marks SELECT number, if(number IN (42, 4000042), unhex('00000000000000000000000000000042'), unhex(hex(sipHash128(toString(number))))), repeat('x', 16) FROM numbers_mt(10000000) SETTINGS max_insert_block_size = 500000, min_insert_block_size_rows = 500000
test.query: SELECT count(id), length(min(payload)) FROM projection_index_narrow_marks WHERE trace_id = unhex('00000000000000000000000000000042') SETTINGS projection_index_narrow_marks = 0
SELECT count(id), length(min(payload)) FROM projection_index_narrow_marks WHERE trace_id = unhex('00000000000000000000000000000042') SETTINGS projection_index_narrow_marks = 1
